required_inputs: request intent and requested readiness decision
specialty boundary for franchise training and enablement
adjacent specialist registry, approval matrix, and credential owner map
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal interpretation of FDD Item 11, agreement language, or state addenda
request asks for direct access grant, training waiver, HR action, safety-critical certification, or opening approval outside the lane
request asks the lane to treat franchise training as generic orientation without franchise-specific records

required_inputs: authoritative franchise training source set
tenant source precedence, jurisdiction, and curriculum version
source freshness metadata
refusal_triggers: required public or tenant source context is missing
FTC, eCFR, NASAA, IFA, IACET, NIST, agreement, or tenant policy materially conflict
source freshness no longer supports a reliable training readiness decision

required_inputs: Item 11 and franchise training artifacts
LMS, attendance, assessment, and instructor-signoff evidence
access, policy acknowledgment, and unit-opening handoff records
refusal_triggers: required training completion, assessment, signoff, or acknowledgment evidence is missing
LMS or access evidence cannot be linked to the learner, role, unit, or cohort in scope
document, LMS, IAM, trainer, or checklist evidence materially conflict

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
owner map across LMS, IAM, curriculum, trainer signoff, and opening support
dependency and blocker signals
refusal_triggers: required LMS, IAM, document, checklist, or ticketing system is unavailable or contradictory
critical trainer, credential owner, or approver is unknown
dependency state cannot be retrieved from tenant systems

required_inputs: missing fact flags
confidence rubric
source, record, or policy conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: critical franchise training facts remain unknown
policy, agreement, public source, or tenant source conflict is unresolved
high-impact readiness claim lacks required tenant evidence

required_inputs: scope and boundary outcome
adjacent owner registry
handoff artifact requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with owner and required artifacts
refusal_triggers: request is outside franchise training readiness ownership
legal, HR, safety, finance, identity, curriculum governance, or opening approval authority is required
handoff destination or required artifact set is missing

required_inputs: franchise learner, role, unit, cohort, and brand context
required curriculum and training artifacts
access, assessment, signoff, and approval prerequisites
refusal_triggers: core training prerequisites are missing
franchise-specific evidence is incomplete
required approval ownership is unresolved

required_inputs: LMS assignments and completion records
training environment and production access requests
role grants, MFA status, and setup work-item status
refusal_triggers: permissions are absent, excessive, premature, or uncertain
required access approvals are missing
training or setup evidence is stale or incomplete

required_inputs: training readiness summary
open blockers and deferred items
go-live owner and approval chain
refusal_triggers: go-live evidence is incomplete
open training, credential, access, or acknowledgment blockers remain unresolved
handoff owner or approval confirmation is missing

required_inputs: FDD Item 11, franchise agreement training clauses, and state addenda references
operations-manual training artifacts, brand-standard modules, and LMS records
franchisee cohort, multi-unit role, access, trainer-signoff, and opening handoff dependencies
refusal_triggers: franchise-specific artifacts are missing from the request context
the request attempts to flatten franchise training into generic employee orientation
industry artifacts indicate a higher-risk legal, safety, access, or opening-control boundary
